name: Highlights
title: Highlights by HTML5 UP
description: Dark-themed single-page personal portfolio/showcase with fullscreen sections. Opens with a centered header section: large heading ('Highlights'), curly-brace subtitle, and a 'Begin' primary button. Three main fullscreen sections scroll vertically, each with a large background image visible on desktop (hidden on mobile) and overlaid content: Section 1 ('Who I am') has a heading and paragraph text; Section 2 ('Stuff I do') has a heading, subtitle, and a 2x2 icon grid (camera, pencil, code, coffee) with labels; Section 3 ('One more thing') has heading and text. Each section has a 'Next' scroll arrow at the bottom. Footer has social icons (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, GitHub, Email) and copyright. Dark charcoal background with green accent color. Clean, minimal, scroll-driven experience.

typography.style: Extra-bold uppercase Raleway headings with ultra-light body text. Maximum weight contrast. Wide letter-spacing on headings creates an airy, modern feel.

layoutDetails: Full-width, full-height sections using viewport units. Content centered within each section. Background images positioned absolutely behind content. Icon grid uses 2x2 flexbox layout. Responsive: images hidden on mobile, content stacks vertically.
visualStyle: Dark, moody, minimal. Charcoal background with large atmospheric images. Mint-green accent provides subtle color pop. Fullscreen sections create a presentation-like scroll experience. Ultra-light body text on dark background for elegant contrast.

name: Lens
title: Lens by HTML5 UP
description: Fullscreen photo gallery with a split-panel layout. Left side shows a large selected image that fills the viewport height; right side displays a scrollable thumbnail grid of 12 images, each with a title and short description. Header at top-right shows the site name and social icon links (Twitter, Instagram, GitHub, Email). Clicking a thumbnail swaps the full-size image on the left with a smooth transition. Footer with copyright at bottom. Dark background (#101010) with white text. Preloader with multi-stage fade-in animation. Lightbox-style image viewer with no traditional navigation.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with uniform weight, minimal typographic hierarchy

layoutDetails: Split-panel layout: left panel fills viewport with selected full-size image, right panel is a scrollable thumbnail grid. No fixed container width. Responsive collapses to stacked layout on mobile.
visualStyle: Dark, immersive photo gallery. Minimal chrome, maximum image focus. Teal accent on hover states. Split-panel creates a magazine-like browsing feel.

name: Multiverse
title: Multiverse by HTML5 UP
description: Dark-themed masonry photo gallery with poptrox lightbox. Top header bar with site name and an 'About' icon link. Main area displays 12 thumbnail images in a fluid masonry grid layout, each with a title and description overlay on hover. Clicking opens a full-size lightbox viewer. Footer panel slides up from bottom with two columns: left has about text, social icons (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, GitHub, Dribbble, LinkedIn), and copyright; right has a contact form (Name, Email, Message, Send/Reset buttons). Dark charcoal background (#242629) with teal/green accent color. Preloader animation on page load.

typography.style: Ultra-light weight throughout, uppercase headings with wide letter-spacing

layoutDetails: Fluid masonry grid fills viewport width. No fixed container. Footer panel uses 2-column split layout. Responsive stacks to single column on mobile with vertical scroll.
visualStyle: Dark, immersive, Pinterest-style masonry gallery. Minimal UI chrome lets images dominate. Teal accent on hover overlays. Footer panel slides up as an overlay.

name: Parallelism
title: Parallelism by HTML5 UP
description: Horizontal-scrolling photo portfolio with a cinematic, film-strip layout. Content scrolls left-to-right instead of vertically. Opens with an intro panel (span-2 width) showing the site name and subtitle. Followed by 8 photo thumbnails of varying widths (span-1, span-2, span-3) creating a rhythmic horizontal flow. A second row repeats with 9 more thumbnails. Each thumbnail has a title overlay. Clicking opens a poptrox lightbox for full-size viewing. Footer section at the end with about text, social icons (Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, Dribbble, Email), and copyright. Dark background with full-bleed background image and gradient overlay. Rose/coral accent color (#d64760).

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with semi-bold headings, minimal typographic treatment

layoutDetails: Horizontal scroll layout using CSS flexbox. Items have variable widths (span-1 to span-3) creating visual rhythm. Two horizontal rows stacked vertically. Mouse wheel maps to horizontal scroll. Responsive falls back to vertical scroll on mobile.
visualStyle: Cinematic, film-strip aesthetic. Dark background with full-bleed photo and gradient overlay. Horizontal scrolling creates a unique, immersive browsing experience. Rose accent for interactive elements.

name: Artcore
title: Artcore - Responsive HTML5 Template
description: Multi-page gallery/portfolio template with sophisticated editorial layout. Two-tier header: top bar has logo (ArtCore with orange em) with tagline on white background, and 6 social icon links; bottom navigation on gray (#efefef) with search overlay, arrow buttons, and horizontal menu with slash separators and dropdown submenus. Fullscreen Swiper slider with 3 slides having dark overlay, heading, description, and bordered button. Multi-page with Services, Projects (2/3-col, single), Blog (masonry, single), Team, Archives, 404, and Contact pages. Roboto Slab serif headings, Roboto sans-serif body. Spinning circle preloader.

typography.style: Editorial serif headings with clean sans-serif body

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 fluid container, full-width header, 60px padding, Swiper fullscreen slider
visualStyle: Sophisticated editorial gallery with serif headings, orange accents, and gray tones

name: Fluid Gallery
title: Fluid Gallery - templatemo
description: Fluid responsive image gallery template with a top navbar featuring logo icon, site title, and 5 navigation tabs (1st fluid, 2nd fluid, 3rd fluid, Columns, Message). Uses a hero slider navigation system where each nav tab reveals a different fullscreen content page. Gallery pages display image grids with CSS figure/figcaption hover effects (effect-sadie) showing title and description overlays. Each gallery page contains 12 thumbnail images in a fluid responsive grid. Columns page shows a multi-column text layout. Message page has a contact form. Supports color and grayscale modes via JavaScript toggle. Uses Magnific Popup for lightbox image viewing. Light gray (#DDDDDD) background with blue (#3f97c9) accent color.

typography.style: Light-weight sans-serif with clean gallery presentation

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 4 grid with fluid container. Hero slider navigation system for page switching. Fluid responsive image grid with CSS figure effects. Magnific Popup lightbox. Responsive from 400px to 1340px with many breakpoints.
visualStyle: Clean, modern gallery with colorful accent palette, fluid responsive image grids, CSS hover transitions with figcaption overlays, and optional grayscale mode.
